title: IB A2
description:
This assignment is to be performed in your interactive brokers paper trading account.

 

Unwinding the JPY-USD Carry Trade that you established in IB A1

 

Step 1 (Close out the short JPY position): Sell 100,000 units of USD.JPY.

In your Interactive brokers account search for USD.JPY. Select Sell, quantity = 100,000, order type = market, time-in-force = Day. No adjustments are needed for "Profit Taker" and "Stop Loss".  

 

Step 2 (Sell USD assets): Sell your US assets that you bought as part of the previous assignment (IB A1).

For the purpose of illustration, suppose that in IB A1 you bought 100 units of US Treasury Note 3.875 Jan 15'26.

To sell your bonds, in your account, go to Holdings. Click on the US asset that you want to sell. Select Sell, quantity = 100 units, ORDER TYPE = Market, TIME-IN-FORCE = Day. No adjustments are needed for "OUTSIDE RTH", "ALL or NONE" "Profit Taker".  

 

Deliverable:

Please upload a screen shot with your account holdings that clearly shows your cash and securities positions.
descriptionText:
This assignment is to be performed in your interactive brokers paper trading account.
 
Unwinding the JPY-USD Carry Trade that you established in IB A1
 
Step 1 (Close out the short JPY position): Sell 100,000 units of USD.JPY.
In your Interactive brokers account search for USD.JPY. Select Sell, quantity = 100,000, order type = market, time-in-force = Day. No adjustments are needed for "Profit Taker" and "Stop Loss".  
 
Step 2 (Sell USD assets): Sell your US assets that you bought as part of the previous assignment (IB A1).
For the purpose of illustration, suppose that in IB A1 you bought 100 units of US Treasury Note 3.875 Jan 15'26.
To sell your bonds, in your account, go to Holdings. Click on the US asset that you want to sell. Select Sell, quantity = 100 units, ORDER TYPE = Market, TIME-IN-FORCE = Day. No adjustments are needed for "OUTSIDE RTH", "ALL or NONE" "Profit Taker".  
 
Deliverable:
Please upload a screen shot with your account holdings that clearly shows your cash and securities positions.
